description: Style Note Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone shoes. Give your formal wear a twist of style or your semi formal wear a trend lift with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion. Product Details Pointy toed brown slip on shoes with a stacked heel Textured brown leather upper Elasticated inserts at the side of the tongue Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole which is textured Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine
